data.title: MP Materials Announces Joint Venture for Rare Earth Refinery
data.description:
Meet Your ETF AI Analyst

  • Discover how TipRanks' ETF AI Analyst can help you make smarter investment decisions
  • Explore ETFs TipRanks' users love and see what insights the ETF AI Analyst reveals about the ones you follow.

MP Materials ( (MP) ) has issued an announcement.

On November 19, 2025, MP Materials announced a strategic joint venture with the U.S. Department of War and Maaden, Saudi Arabia’s flagship mining company, to develop a rare earth refinery in Saudi Arabia. This initiative is part of a historic cooperation framework between the U.S. and Saudi Arabia aimed at diversifying the global supply chain for critical minerals. The joint venture will leverage Saudi Arabia’s resources and infrastructure to produce rare earth oxides, supporting U.S. and Saudi manufacturing and defense sectors. The agreement underscores MP Materials’ role as a national champion and aligns with U.S. economic and national security interests, while also expanding MP’s global footprint and shareholder value.

The most recent analyst rating on (MP) stock is a Buy with a $77.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on MP Materials stock, see the MP Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on MP Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, MP is a Neutral.

MP Materials’ overall stock score is driven by significant financial challenges and bearish technical indicators. However, the positive outlook from the earnings call, with strong production growth and strategic partnerships, provides a potential turnaround opportunity. Valuation remains a concern due to negative profitability metrics.

To see Spark’s full report on MP stock, click here.

More about MP Materials

MP Materials is America’s only fully-integrated rare earth producer, offering capabilities from mining and processing to advanced metallization, magnet manufacturing, and recycling. The company operates the world’s second-largest rare earth mine in Mountain Pass, California, and manufactures permanent magnets at its facility in Texas. MP Materials is expanding its downstream capabilities through a public-private partnership with the U.S. Department of War to build an end-to-end U.S. rare earth magnet supply chain.

Average Trading Volume: 14,710,458

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy

Current Market Cap: $10.1B

data.title: Nomadar Corp. Signs Land Lease for Event Center
data.description:
Meet Your ETF AI Analyst

  • Discover how TipRanks' ETF AI Analyst can help you make smarter investment decisions
  • Explore ETFs TipRanks' users love and see what insights the ETF AI Analyst reveals about the ones you follow.

Nomadar Corp. Class A ( (NOMA) ) has provided an announcement.

On November 17, 2025, Nomadar Corp. entered into a land lease agreement with Sport City Cádiz S.L. for a plot in El Puerto de Santa María, Spain, marking a significant step in their development of the Nomadar Multipurpose Event Center. This agreement, which includes a purchase option, aligns with Nomadar’s strategy to create a world-class destination for international events, reinforcing its position in the sports and entertainment industry. The project is closely linked to Cádiz CF and aims to integrate sports, culture, and technology, enhancing Nomadar’s role in the Sportech City development.

More about Nomadar Corp. Class A

Nomadar Corp. is a U.S.-based company operating at the intersection of sports, tourism, technology, and health. It is a subsidiary of Cádiz CF, a professional soccer club in La Liga, and focuses on developing innovative projects that connect global audiences through experiences combining health, entertainment, and digital engagement. The company is advancing the Sportech City real estate development project in southern Europe, aimed at hosting international sports, cultural, and corporate events.

Average Trading Volume: 97,032

For an in-depth examination of NOMA stock, go to TipRanks’ Overview page.

Morgan Securities LLC to sell 3,000,000 shares of its common stock at a public offering price of $19.50, with an additional option for underwriters to purchase 450,000 more shares. On November 18, 2025, DBR Land Holdings LLC, a subsidiary of LandBridge Company LLC, entered into a $275 million revolving credit agreement with Texas Capital Bank and other lenders. LandBridge Company LLC operates in the energy sector, focusing on oil and gas exploration and development. data.title: 5E Advanced Materials Boosts Fort Cady Resource Estimates
data.description:
Meet Your ETF AI Analyst

  • Discover how TipRanks' ETF AI Analyst can help you make smarter investment decisions
  • Explore ETFs TipRanks' users love and see what insights the ETF AI Analyst reveals about the ones you follow.

The latest update is out from 5E Advanced Materials, Inc. ( (FEAM) ).

On November 19, 2025, 5E Advanced Materials announced a significant upgrade to its mineral resource estimates at the Fort Cady Project in California, effective November 15, 2025. The updated estimates show a 61% increase in measured and indicated borate resources and a 54% increase in lithium resources. This enhancement positions 5E as a potential leading borate producer in the U.S., with the project offering expansion options for future production. The resource upgrade underscores Fort Cady’s potential to secure a domestic boron supply chain, aligning with its designation as a critical mineral by the U.S. government.

The most recent analyst rating on (FEAM) stock is a Buy with a $7.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on 5E Advanced Materials, Inc. stock, see the FEAM Stock Forecast page.

While technical indicators show some short-term improvement, long-term technical trends remain a concern. The recent corporate restructuring is a positive step towards addressing these issues, but significant risks remain, resulting in a low overall score.

To see Spark’s full report on FEAM stock, click here.

More about 5E Advanced Materials, Inc.

5E Advanced Materials, Inc. is a development stage company aiming to become a vertically integrated global leader in refined borates, advanced boron derivative materials, and critical minerals. The company focuses on supplying these materials to industries involved in global decarbonization, energy independence, and national security, leveraging its large domestic boron resource in Southern California.

An update from Penske Automotive Group ( (PAG) ) is now available.

On November 19, 2025, Penske Automotive Group announced the acquisition of four franchised automotive dealerships, including Longo Toyota and Longo Lexus in California, and Longo Toyota of Prosper in Texas. This strategic acquisition, completed through a Membership Interests Purchase Agreement, is expected to add $1.5 billion in estimated annualized revenue and enhance Penske’s presence in the California and Texas markets. The purchase was funded through a combination of existing credit and a note payable to the seller. The transaction is anticipated to strengthen Penske’s relationship with Toyota and Lexus brands, expanding its operations and market reach.

The most recent analyst rating on (PAG) stock is a Buy with a $195.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Penske Automotive Group stock, see the PAG Stock Forecast page.

To see Spark’s full report on PAG stock, click here.

More about Penske Automotive Group

Penske Automotive Group, Inc., headquartered in Bloomfield Hills, Michigan, is a diversified international transportation services company. It is one of the world’s premier automotive and commercial truck retailers with operations across four continents and nine countries. The company operates dealerships in the United States, the United Kingdom, Canada, Germany, Italy, Japan, and Australia, and is a major retailer of commercial trucks in North America. Penske Automotive also distributes and retails commercial vehicles, diesel and gas engines, power systems, and related parts and services primarily in Australia and New Zealand.

The latest update is out from Aptera Motors Corp. Class B ( (SEV) ).

Aptera Motors Corp. has been in discussions with the California Energy Commission (CEC) regarding adjustments to its milestone schedule requirements. On November 18, 2025, the CEC revised these milestones, ensuring the grant agreement remains intact but altering the reimbursement process to be contingent on meeting the new milestones. Consequently, Aptera does not expect further reimbursements from the CEC in 2025, and there is uncertainty about meeting the milestones to secure the full grant disbursements.

AIM ImmunoTech ( (AIM) ) has shared an update.

On November 18, 2025, AIM ImmunoTech Inc. entered into a Note Purchase Agreement with Streeterville Capital, LLC, resulting in the sale of an unsecured Promissory Note with a principal amount of $3,301,250. The transaction, which closed on the same date, involved a purchase price of $2,500,000 after accounting for an issuance discount and transaction costs. The Note bears a 10% annual interest rate, with a maturity date set for 24 months from issuance. The agreement includes mandatory prepayment terms tied to future fundraising activities and outlines conditions for default, which could lead to increased interest rates.

data.title: Cellectis Unveils Breakthrough in Non-Viral Gene Editing with CssDNA
data.description:
Meet Your ETF AI Analyst

  • Discover how TipRanks' ETF AI Analyst can help you make smarter investment decisions
  • Explore ETFs TipRanks' users love and see what insights the ETF AI Analyst reveals about the ones you follow.

Cellectis SA ( (CLLS) ) has shared an announcement.

On November 19, 2025, Cellectis published an article in Nature Communications highlighting a breakthrough in non-viral gene editing. The company introduced circular single-stranded DNA (CssDNA) as an efficient non-viral DNA donor template for gene insertion in hematopoietic stem and progenitor cells (HSPCs). This innovation significantly enhances the potential of non-viral gene therapy by achieving higher knock-in efficiency and applicability to multiple cell types, marking a pivotal advance in the development of next-generation cell and gene therapies.

The most recent analyst rating on (CLLS) stock is a Hold with a $4.50 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Cellectis SA stock, see the CLLS Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on CLLS Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, CLLS is a Neutral.

Cellectis SA’s overall stock score is primarily influenced by its financial performance, which is challenged by persistent losses and cash flow issues. Technical analysis shows a positive trend, but valuation remains a concern due to negative earnings. The earnings call provided positive sentiment with advancements in clinical trials and strategic partnerships, although legal uncertainties remain.

To see Spark’s full report on CLLS stock, click here.

More about Cellectis SA

Cellectis is a clinical-stage biotechnology company that utilizes a pioneering gene-editing platform to develop life-saving cell and gene therapies. The company focuses on an allogeneic approach for CAR T immunotherapies in oncology, offering off-the-shelf gene-edited CAR T-cells for cancer treatment, and also develops gene therapies for other therapeutic indications. Cellectis controls the entire cell and gene therapy value chain with its in-house manufacturing capabilities.
